commands.review_summary:
The branch wraps channel message-tool discovery field reads in guarded fallbacks and adds regressions for unreadable schema contributions and scoped action lists.

PR surface: Source +118, Tests +93. Total +211 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows current main still dereferences plugin-returned discovery fields and schema contribution fields without guards; the PR adds focused tests that exercise throwing getters on those fields.
commands.review_followup: - No automated repair is needed; the remaining action is maintainer review and undraft/landing approval for a protected maintainer PR.

target.title: fix(channels): harden message action schema discovery
target.body:
## Summary
- Harden channel message action discovery against plugin-returned getters/proxies that throw while reading discovery fields.
- Keep cross-channel message actions conservative when current-channel schema action lists are unreadable, and skip unreadable schema properties without dropping later healthy schema fragments.
- Add regressions for unreadable schema properties and scoped action lists.

## Verification
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/channels/plugins/message-actions.test.ts -- --reporter=dot`
- `./node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check src/channels/plugins/message-action-discovery.ts src/channels/plugins/message-actions.test.ts`
- `./node_modules/.bin/oxlint src/channels/plugins/message-action-discovery.ts src/channels/plugins/message-actions.test.ts`
- `git diff --check`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local`
- AWS Crabbox `pnpm check:changed`: `run_cf75311965a6`, lease `cbx_de916f858c78`, slug `jade-shrimp`, provider `aws`, exit 0; lanes `core`, `coreTests`, `extensions`, `extensionTests`; command 6m59.614s, total 7m18.169s

## Real behavior proof
Behavior addressed: malformed channel plugin `describeMessageTool` schema fragments can no longer crash message-tool schema/action discovery through throwing getters.
Real environment tested: local sparse OpenClaw worktree on branch `fuzz-tool-schema-next34-20260602`, plus AWS Crabbox PR checkout for `openclaw/openclaw#89550` at head `b3a97c162d6`.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/channels/plugins/message-actions.test.ts -- --reporter=dot`; remote `env OPENCLAW_CHECK_CHANGED_REMOTE_CHILD=1 OPENCLAW_CHANGED_LANES_RAW_SYNC=1 corepack pnpm check:changed`.
Evidence after fix: focused channel plugin message-action tests passed with 12 tests; AWS Crabbox `run_cf75311965a6` passed `pnpm check:changed` with extension-impacting lanes selected.
Observed result after fix: unreadable schema properties are logged and skipped while healthy schema fields remain available; unreadable current-channel scoped action lists fail closed for cross-channel action discovery.
What was not tested: no live third-party channel plugin runtime was exercised beyond the plugin discovery contract tests and remote changed gate.
target.author: vincentkoc
